steps.title: Use the rectangle area formula
steps.content: The area of a rectangle is length times width. Here, the length is $64$ inches and the width is $32$ inches.

steps.title: Identify the area formula and given values
steps.content: The area of a rectangle is found by multiplying length times width. We are given: length = 64 inches and width = 32 inches.

steps.title: Calculate the area by multiplication
steps.content: Substitute the values into the formula: $$A = 64 \times 32 = 2048$$ The area of the rectangle is 2048 square inches.
